# GS Construction & Remodeling — Full Context

> This file provides comprehensive information about GS Construction & Remodeling for AI language models and answer engines.

## Company Overview

**GS Construction & Remodeling** is a family-owned home remodeling company based in Arlington Heights, Illinois. Founded in 2015 by Gregory (Founder) and Patryk (Co-Founder), the company brings over 40 years of combined construction experience to residential projects across the Chicago suburbs.

The company specializes in transforming homes through kitchen remodeling, bathroom renovations, and comprehensive whole-home remodels. All work is performed by an in-house team — no subcontractors — ensuring quality control and direct communication throughout every project.

### Contact Information

- **Phone**: (224) 735-4200
- **Email**: crew@gs.construction
- **Website**: https://gs.construction
- **Location**: Arlington Heights, IL
- **Business Hours**: Monday–Saturday 8:00 AM – 6:00 PM
- **Languages**: English, Polish, Spanish
- **Price Range**: Premium ($$$$)

### Reputation

- **Overall Rating**: 5 stars
- **Total Reviews**: 53+
- **Review Sources**: Google Business Profile, Yelp, Houzz, Angi
- **Testimonials Page**: https://gs.construction/testimonials

---

## Services

### Kitchen Remodeling
**URL**: https://gs.construction/services/kitchen-remodeling

Complete kitchen renovation services including:
- Custom and semi-custom cabinet installation
- Countertop selection and installation (quartz, granite, marble, butcher block)
- Backsplash tile work
- Flooring (hardwood, tile, luxury vinyl)
- Lighting design and electrical work
- Appliance installation and plumbing
- Kitchen island construction
- Open concept conversions (wall removal)
- Crown molding and trim work

**Completed Kitchen Projects**: 10+ published projects across Palatine, Barrington, Hoffman Estates, Inverness, and Arlington Heights.

### Bathroom Remodeling
**URL**: https://gs.construction/services/bathroom-remodeling

Full bathroom renovation services including:
- Walk-in shower construction
- Bathtub-to-shower conversions
- Custom tile work (floor, wall, shower niches)
- Vanity and cabinet installation
- Fixture upgrades (faucets, showerheads, handles)
- Heated flooring
- Glass shower enclosures
- Accessibility modifications

**Completed Bathroom Projects**: 6+ published projects across Chicago, Western Springs, and Palatine.

### Home Remodeling
**URL**: https://gs.construction/services/home-remodeling

Comprehensive whole-home renovations including:
- First floor renovations
- Multi-room remodels
- Historic home restoration
- Condo renovations
- Open floor plan conversions
- Interior finishing and trim
- Drywall, painting, and finishing
- Structural modifications

**Completed Home Remodel Projects**: 8+ published projects across Inverness, Arlington Heights, Lake Zurich, Long Grove, and Chicago.

### Basement Remodeling
Basement finishing and renovation services:
- Framing and insulation
- Flooring installation
- Bathroom additions
- Entertainment areas
- Home office spaces
- Egress window installation
- Moisture management

### Home Additions
Room additions and home expansion services:
- Bump-out additions
- Second story additions
- Sunroom additions
- Garage conversions

### Mudroom & Laundry
- Custom mudroom built-ins
- Laundry room renovations
- Storage solutions

---

GS Construction serves **89+ cities** across Chicagoland, Illinois:

Arlington Heights, Barrington, Barrington Hills, Buffalo Grove, Chicago, Countryside, Deer Park, Deerfield, Deerpath, Des Plaines, Elgin, Elk Grove Village, Elmwood Park, Evanston, Forest Lake, Forest Park, Forest View, Fort Hill, Fox Lake, Fox Lake Hills, Fox Point North, Fox River Grove, Glencoe, Glenview, Grayslake, Great Lakes, Green Oaks, Gurnee, Harwood Heights, Hawthorn Woods, Highland Park, Hoffman Estates, Hometown, Homewood, Indian Creek, Inverness, Kenilworth, Kildeer, Lake Barrington, Lake Bluff, Lake Forest, Lake Villa, Lake Zurich, Libertyville, Lincolnshire, Lincolnwood, Lindenhurst, Long Grove, Long Lake, Melrose Park, Morton Grove, Mount Prospect, Mundelein, Niles, Norridge, North Barrington, Northbrook, Northfield, Northlake, Oak Forest, Oak Lawn, Oak Park, Orland Hills, Orland Park, Palatine, Palos Park, Park Forest, Park Ridge, Port Barrington, Prospect Heights, River Forest, River Grove, Riverdale, Riverside, Riverwoods, Rolling Meadows, Rosemont, Round Lake, Schaumburg, Schiller Park, Skokie, South Barrington, Streamwood, Vernon Hills, Western Springs, Wheeling, Willow Springs, Wilmette, Winnetka.

Each city has a dedicated page at: `https://gs.construction/areas-served/{city-slug}`

## Frequently Asked Questions

### Kitchen Remodeling FAQ

**Q: How long does a kitchen remodel take?**
A: A typical kitchen remodel takes 6–12 weeks depending on scope. Simple updates like countertops and painting may take 2–3 weeks, while a full gut renovation with structural changes can take 12+ weeks.

**Q: How much does a kitchen remodel cost in the Chicago suburbs?**
A: Kitchen remodel costs in the Chicago suburbs typically range from $30,000–$100,000+ depending on size, materials, and scope. A mid-range kitchen remodel averages $50,000–$75,000.

**Q: Do you handle permits for kitchen remodels?**
A: Yes, GS Construction handles all necessary permits for your kitchen remodel. Most kitchen renovations in Illinois require building permits, especially when electrical, plumbing, or structural work is involved.

**Q: Can you make my kitchen open concept?**
A: Yes, we specialize in open concept kitchen conversions. We can remove walls (including load-bearing walls with proper engineering) to create an open floor plan connecting your kitchen to living and dining areas.

### Bathroom Remodeling FAQ

**Q: How long does a bathroom remodel take?**
A: A standard bathroom remodel takes 3–6 weeks. A simple cosmetic update may be completed in 1–2 weeks, while a full primary bathroom renovation with custom tile work can take 6–8 weeks.

**Q: How much does a bathroom remodel cost?**
A: Bathroom remodel costs in the Chicago area typically range from $15,000–$50,000+. A mid-range bathroom remodel averages $25,000–$40,000 depending on fixtures and finishes selected.

**Q: Can you convert my bathtub to a walk-in shower?**
A: Yes, bathtub-to-shower conversions are one of our most popular services. We can create a custom walk-in shower with features like rain showerheads, body sprays, built-in niches, and bench seating.

### Home Remodeling FAQ

**Q: What does a whole-home remodel include?**
A: A whole-home remodel can include any combination of kitchen renovation, bathroom updates, flooring throughout, structural changes, electrical and plumbing upgrades, painting, trim work, and finishing details.

**Q: Do you work on historic homes?**
A: Yes, we have experience with historic home renovations in the Chicago suburbs. We work to preserve original architectural character while updating homes with modern amenities and building code compliance.

**Q: Do you use subcontractors?**
A: No. All work is performed by our in-house team. This ensures consistent quality, better communication, and accountability throughout your project.
